The lighting is dim, casting shadows on his face and neck, and he remains still for an extended period. Later, he raises his hand to his ear, adjusting or touching the earpiece. The scene shifts to another man wearing headphones, seated in front of a computer screen, his expression focused as he looks intently at the display. The background is dark and indistinct, with faint blue light reflections visible behind him.
